creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Stefan,

Thanks for submitting your bug report and sorry for replying that late.
I believe the issues you faced should be fixed with the recent update
(see PR #173983) as I managed to compile the 2011.11 release on
FreeBSD-9.0 (both i386 and amd64).
Hence I will close your bug report but feel free to open a new one if
you still find issue with the new rakudo version.

Regards,
Frederic
